calendar.matters: Petition To Confirm Ownership And To Compel Return Of Property

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Off Calendar
TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR
EXAMINER: EDWARD MIYAUCHI

Petition To Confirm Ownership And To Compel Return Of Property
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court takes the matter off calendar.

The Court notes that the status hearing on close of the estate currently set for June 8, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 will stay on calendar.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Guitron. Matter not reported.

Off Calendar Jul-14-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Benjamin Harvey for Sunil Dhar, Administrator (via Zoom).

Prior to the start of the hearing, Mr. Harvey was informed by the Courtroom Clerk that the Court had become aware of the recently filed Petition on Report of Status of Administration and had decided to take the hearing on Status on Close of Estate off calendar. Mr. Harvey was then excused from appearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
